pr.title: Link to decomp.dev instead of repo on Wiki TU page
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: PR 2638 updates the Wiki TU generation script so translation-unit links point to decomp.dev unit pages instead of repository blob paths. The change is isolated to tools/wiki_tu.py and also modernizes a few Python type annotations.

key_files.role: Only changed file; generates Wiki TU table rows and now creates decomp.dev links for units.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: row_full and row_slim use link from file_link

what_changed.text: Replaced repository blob links of the form ../blob/master/src/{file}.c with decomp.dev links of the form https://decomp.dev/doldecomp/melee?unit={quote(unit['name'], safe='')}.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed f"[`{file}`](../blob/master/src/{file}.c)" in row_full and row_slim

what_changed.text: Introduced a shared file_link(unit) helper that returns both the stripped file path and Markdown link, reducing duplicated link construction between full and slim table rows.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added def file_link(unit) -> tuple[str, str]
raw_diff: row_full uses file, link = file_link(unit)

what_changed.text: Kept the existing behavior that strips the leading module component from unit names before displaying the file path.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: moved comment and expression for stripping leading module into file_link(unit)

what_changed.text: Modernized Python typing syntax by replacing Dict and Optional imports/usages with built-in generics and union syntax.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: from typing import Dict, Optional, cast changed to from typing import cast
raw_diff: read_wiki return type changed to dict[str, dict[str, str]]
raw_diff: Optional[Path] changed to Path | None
raw_diff: Optional[float] changed to float | None

smart_moves.text: Centralizing display-file extraction and link generation in file_link(unit) avoids keeping separate duplicated Markdown URL construction in row_full and row_slim.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed duplicated file_link local variable construction from row_full and row_slim

smart_moves.text: URL-encoding the unit name with quote(..., safe='') makes the generated decomp.dev query parameter robust for unit names containing slash or other special characters.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For project documentation that lists translation units, direct links to decomp.dev unit pages can be more actionable than links to repository source blobs because they take readers to the matching/progress view for that unit.
evidence_refs: PR title: Link to decomp.dev instead of repo on Wiki TU page
raw_diff: changed row links from ../blob/master/src/{file}.c to https://decomp.dev/doldecomp/melee?unit=...

naming_conventions.name: file_link
naming_conventions.convention: A helper named file_link returns the display file path and Markdown link together for Wiki TU row generation.

follow_up_queries: Wiki TU page repo blob link decomp.dev

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number, title, author, MERGED state, timestamps, changed file counts
notes: Evidence is strong for the mechanical tooling/documentation change because the diff is complete and the PR is small.
There is no PR body or review discussion, so no reviewer intent or rationale beyond the title and diff should be inferred.
No build, test, or runtime validation results are present in the slice.
This PR does not contain game decomp source changes, assembly tactics, or matching claims.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Wiki TU links can target decomp.dev unit pages
accepted_candidate_records.text: In tools/wiki_tu.py, PR 2638 changed generated translation-unit table links from repository source blob paths to decomp.dev unit URLs using the unit name as a URL-encoded query parameter.
evidence_refs: PR title: Link to decomp.dev instead of repo on Wiki TU page
raw_diff: row_full and row_slim return rows using link from file_link(unit)

source_update_candidates.title: tools/wiki_tu.py generates Wiki TU table links
source_update_candidates.text: tools/wiki_tu.py contains Wiki translation-unit table generation logic. As of PR 2638, row_full and row_slim use a shared file_link(unit) helper to emit Markdown links to decomp.dev unit pages.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future agents classify tools/wiki_tu.py as documentation/progress-page generation tooling rather than game decomp source.

rejection_notes: Do not infer any accepted global decomp standard from this PR; it is a small tooling/documentation link update.
Do not record validation, test, or reviewer approval details beyond merge status; no review comments or CI/build evidence are included in the slice.
Do not infer that all project documentation links should prefer decomp.dev; the evidence only covers the Wiki TU page generated by tools/wiki_tu.py.
